db:info.db:title: Getting Started Programming with Qt Quick

db:abstract.db:para: A tutorial for Qt Quick based on an alarms application.

db:article.db:programlisting:
TEMPLATE = app
QT += quick
SOURCES += main.cpp
RESOURCES += qml.qrc
target.path = $$[QT_INSTALL_EXAMPLES]/demos/alarms INSTALLS += target
